    input wire [3:0] prev_control,
    input wire disturbance,
    output reg [3:0] control_signal
);

        if (disturbance) begin
            control_signal = (prev_control + 1) % 16; // Increment with wrap-around
        end else begin
            control_signal = prev_control; // Maintain previous
        end
    end
endmodule

module TopModule(
    input [3:0] req,
    output reg [3:0] grant
);
    always @(*) begin
        grant = 4'b0000; // Default to no grant
        if (req[0]) grant = 4'b0001; // Grant to req[0] if it's active
        else if (req[1]) grant = 4'b0010; // Grant to req[1] if req[0] is not active
        else if (req[2]) grant = 4'b0100; // Grant to req[2] if req[0] and req[1] are not active
        else if (req[3]) grant = 4'b1000; // Grant to req[3] if all higher priority are not active
    end
endmodule

module TopModule (
    input J,
    input K,
    input clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (J == 0 && K == 0) begin
            Q <= Q; // No change
        end
        else if (J == 1 && K == 0) begin
            Q <= 1; // Set
        end
        else if (J == 0 && K == 1) begin
            Q <= 0; // Reset
        end
        else if (J == 1 && K == 1) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // Toggle
        end
    end
endmodule

module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [31:0] load_value,
    output reg [31:0] timer_value
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            timer_value <= 32'b0; // Reset the timer to zero
        end else if (load) begin
            timer_value <= load_value; // Load the new value
        end else begin
            timer_value <= timer_value + 1; // Increment the timer
        end
    end
endmodule

results.original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [3:0] req,
    output reg [3:0] grant
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        grant <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        grant <= 4'b0000; // Reset grant to zero
        if (req[3]) grant[3] <= 1; // Grant to highest priority
        else if (req[2]) grant[2] <= 1; // Grant to second highest
        else if (req[1]) grant[1] <= 1; // Grant to third highest
        else if (req[0]) grant[0] <= 1; // Grant to lowest
    end
end

endmodule

module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [7:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Low speed
        end else begin
            if (temperature < 20) begin
                fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Low speed
            end else if (temperature >= 20 && temperature < 30) begin
                fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Medium speed
            end else begin
                fan_speed <= 2'b10; // High speed
            end
        end
    end
endmodule

results.original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire clk,                // Baud rate clock
    input wire rst,                // Reset signal
    input wire [7:0] data_in,     // Data to transmit
    input wire start_transmit,     // Signal to start transmission
    output reg tx,                 // Transmitted serial data
    output reg busy                // Indicates transmitter is busy
);

    reg [3:0] state;               // State machine current state
    reg [3:0] bit_index;           // Current bit index
    reg [10:0] shift_reg;          // Shift register for UART frame

    localparam IDLE = 4'b0000;
    localparam START_BIT = 4'b0001;
    localparam TRANSMIT = 4'b0010;
    localparam STOP_BIT = 4'b0011;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            state <= IDLE;
            busy <= 0;
            tx <= 1; // Idle state for tx is high
            bit_index <= 0;
            shift_reg <= 0;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (start_transmit) begin
                        shift_reg <= {1'b1, data_in, 1'b0}; // Stop bit, data, start bit
                        bit_index <= 0;
                        busy <= 1;
                        state <= START_BIT;
                    end
                end

                START_BIT: begin
                    tx <= 0; // Start bit
                    state <= TRANSMIT;
                end

                TRANSMIT: begin
                    if (bit_index < 8) begin
                        tx <= shift_reg[bit_index]; // Transmit next bit
                        bit_index <= bit_index + 1;
                    end else begin
                        state <= STOP_BIT; // Go to stop bit
                    end
                end

                STOP_BIT: begin
                    tx <= 1; // Stop bit
                    busy <= 0; // Transmission complete
                    state <= IDLE; // Reset to IDLE
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

module TopModule (
    input wire clk,                // Baud rate clock
    input wire rst,                // Reset signal
    input wire [7:0] data_in,     // Data to transmit
    input wire start_transmit,     // Signal to start transmission
    output reg tx,                 // Transmitted serial data
    output reg busy                // Indicates transmitter is busy
);

    reg [3:0] state;               // State machine current state
    reg [3:0] bit_index;           // Current bit index
    reg [10:0] shift_reg;          // Shift register for UART frame

    localparam IDLE = 4'b0000;
    localparam START_BIT = 4'b0001;
    localparam TRANSMIT = 4'b0010;
    localparam STOP_BIT = 4'b0011;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            state <= IDLE;
            busy <= 0;
            tx <= 1; // Idle state for tx is high
            bit_index <= 0;
            shift_reg <= 0;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (start_transmit) begin
                        shift_reg <= {1'b1, data_in, 1'b0}; // Stop bit, data, start bit
                        bit_index <= 0;
                        busy <= 1;
                        state <= START_BIT;
                    end
                end

                START_BIT: begin
                    tx <= 0; // Start bit
                    state <= TRANSMIT;
                end

                TRANSMIT: begin
                    if (bit_index < 8) begin
                        tx <= shift_reg[bit_index]; // Transmit next bit
                        bit_index <= bit_index + 1;
                    end else begin
                        state <= STOP_BIT; // Go to stop bit
                    end
                end

                STOP_BIT: begin
                    tx <= 1; // Stop bit
                    busy <= 0; // Transmission complete
                    state <= IDLE; // Reset to IDLE
                end
            endcase

    end
endmodule

module TopModule (
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output reg [3:0] S,
    output reg C_out
);
    wire [4:0] temp; // to hold the carry
    
    always @(*) begin
        temp = A + B; // sum the inputs, including carry
        S = temp[3:0]; // the lower 4 bits are the sum
        C_out = temp[4]; // the carry out is the 5th bit
    end
endmodule

);

    input wire rst,
    input wire ctrl,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire [7:0] data_out,
    output reg [7:0] gpio
);

        if (rst) begin
            gpio <= 8'b00000000; // Initialize to low

            gpio <= data_in; // Set GPIO as input

    input wire rst,
    input wire ctrl, // Control signal: 1 for read, 0 for write
    input wire [3:0] gpio_in, // GPIO input pins
    output reg [3:0] gpio_out // GPIO output pins
);

    if (rst) begin
        data_reg <= 4'b0000;
        gpio_out <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin

            data_reg <= gpio_in; // Read from GPIO input
        end else begin
            gpio_out <= data_reg; // Write to GPIO output
        end

module TopModule (
    input [7:0] data_in,      // 8-bit input data
    input [1:0] shift_amount,  // 2-bit shift amount (0-3)
    input direction,           // 0 for left shift, 1 for right shift
    output reg [7:0] data_out  // 8-bit output data
);

always @(*) begin
    case (direction)
        1'b0: begin // Left shift
            data_out = data_in << shift_amount;
        end
        1'b1: begin // Right shift
            data_out = data_in >> shift_amount;
        end
        default: data_out = 8'b0; // Default case
    endcase
end

endmodule

    input [1:0] dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);

        if (divisor == 0) begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero case
            remainder = dividend; // Remainder is the dividend
        end else begin
            quotient = dividend / divisor;
            remainder = dividend % divisor;
        end
    end
endmodule

    input wire CLK,

);

            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle

module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input branch_taken,
    output prediction
);
    reg [1:0] state;
    assign prediction = state[1];

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= 2'b00; // Reset state to strongly not taken
        end else begin
            case (state)
                2'b00: begin // strongly not taken
                    if (branch_taken) begin
                        state <= 2'b01; // Move to weakly not taken
                    end
                end
                2'b01: begin // weakly not taken
                    if (branch_taken) begin
                        state <= 2'b10; // Move to weakly taken
                    end
                end
                2'b10: begin // weakly taken
                    if (branch_taken) begin
                        state <= 2'b11; // Move to strongly taken
                    end else begin
                        state <= 2'b01; // Move back to weakly not taken
                    end
                end
                2'b11: begin // strongly taken
                    if (~branch_taken) begin
                        state <= 2'b10; // Move to weakly taken
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

module TopModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [1:0] control,
    output reg [1:0] speed
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            speed <= 2'b00; // OFF
        end else begin
            case (control)
                2'b00: speed <= 2'b00; // OFF
                2'b01: speed <= 2'b01; // LOW
                2'b10: speed <= 2'b10; // MEDIUM
                2'b11: speed <= 2'b11; // HIGH
                default: speed <= speed; // Maintain current speed
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

module TopModule (
    input [63:0] A,
    input [63:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [63:0] result,
    output reg zero_flag
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (opcode)
            3'b000: result = A + B; // ADD
            3'b001: result = A - B; // SUB
            3'b010: result = A & B; // AND
            3'b011: result = A | B; // OR
            3'b100: result = A ^ B; // XOR
            3'b101: result = ~A;     // NOT
            3'b110: result = ~(A & B); // NAND
            3'b111: result = ~(A | B); // NOR
            default: result = 64'b0;
        endcase
        zero_flag = (result == 64'b0);
    end
endmodule

            3'b011: result = A | B; // OR
            3'b100: result = A ^ B; // XOR
            3'b101: result = ~A;     // NOT
            3'b110: result = ~(A & B); // NAND
            3'b111: result = ~(A | B); // NOR
            default: result = 64'b0;
        endcase
        zero_flag = (result == 64'b0);
    end
endmodule

module TopModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out,
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end

endmodule

results.original_code:
module TopModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire [1:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (temperature)
            2'b00: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Off
            2'b01: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Low
            2'b10: fan_speed <= 2'b10; // Medium
            2'b11: fan_speed <= 2'b11; // High
            default: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default to Off
        endcase
    end
endmodule

results.original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Store data in memory
        end
        data_out <= memory; // Output stored data
    end

    task read;
        input wire [3:0] address;
        output reg [3:0] value;
        begin
            value = memory[address]; // Read data from memory at given address
        end
    endtask
endmodule

results.original_code:
module TopModule (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input [1:0] shift_amount,
    input direction, // 0 for left, 1 for right
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (direction == 0) begin // Left shift
            data_out = data_in << shift_amount;
        end else begin // Right shift
            data_out = data_in >> shift_amount;
        end
    end
endmodule
